title: Music
description: Music box covers and original compositions. Commissions are open.
intro: Music box covers and original compositions. Commissions are open.

notice.title: Download and usage notes
paragraphs: The audio on this page is authorized only for personal, private listening and study. Without the author’s written permission, uploading to any social media/video platform, redistribution, adapted republication, and any commercial use are prohibited.
If you need permission for public release or commercial use, please contact first:
notice.footnote: © ReBone. Copyright belongs to the author. Creation dates and first publication dates are based on the page labels and source file records.

sections.title: Music Box Tracks

items.title: Remember Me
items.quote: “Death is not the end; forgetting is.”

items.title: Saria's Theme
items.quote: “One day, this place is going to be very important to both of us.”
items.origin: Original: Saria's Song / Lost Woods (The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time)

items.title: Army Dreamers
items.quote: Life opens its eyes, life closes its eyes

items.title: City of Stars
items.origin: Original: City of Stars (La La Land)
items.credit: By: Justin Hurwitz, Benj Pasek, Justin Paul

items.title: 古い人形 (Old Doll)
items.quote: In memory of Ib and Mad Father
items.credit: By: 甘茶の音楽工房 (Amacha's Music Studio; can revise if you have a preferred version)

sections.footnote: Display note: arrangement and recreation content is shown for portfolio purposes only. Copyright of the original compositions belongs to the original rights holders; if commercial use is needed, please obtain authorization from the original rights holder first. If any rights holder requests removal, it will be handled accordingly.

sections.title: Original Compositions
sections.note: Note: these may be used in the future as BGM for my own game projects.

wish.title: Wish form
wish.description: If there is a track you would like to hear recreated, you can make a wish here: enter the track name + author. I may create a corresponding piece later.
wish.track_placeholder: Track name (for example: Undertale - Once Upon a Time)
wish.hint: An email draft to me will be generated automatically

pricing.title: Ordering rules
rows: More than 15 extra seconds counts as another half minute
More than 15 extra seconds counts as another half minute
Commercial use allowed; display of the track can be withheld on request
pricing.timeline: Timeline: varies with current study/project schedule; please confirm after getting in touch.
